title: Value Residual + DenseFormer DWA + TTT
author: ahmettrkck

data.description: Cache first layer's value vectors and blend into all subsequent layers to reduce parameter count and prevent attention concentration
Replace U-Net skip connections with learned depth-weighted averaging over all previous layer outputs
Use SmearGate and BigramHash(10240, dim=128) in architecture

novel_contributions: Value Residual (ResFormer): caching and blending first layer's value vectors into subsequent layers for zero parameter overhead and ~10% parameter efficiency gain
DenseFormer DWA: replacing U-Net skip connections with learned depth-weighted averaging over all previous layer outputs (~65 scalar params for 10 layers)
Test-Time Training (TTT): score-then-train strategy using AdamW fine-tuning on already-scored validation tokens during sliding window evaluation
